accurate.why: All claims match bill text; citing the CRA, 87 Fed. Reg. 73822, dates, and 'no force or effect' language are all correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the summary accurately reflects only what is in the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves a specific DOL rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would be nullified and have no force or effect, which is the operative change.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date is specified in the bill beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision: nullification of the named DOL rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral throughout; describes the resolution's mechanism without advocacy.

concise.why: Somewhat verbose; includes procedural details (passage dates, Senate receipt) that add length without adding material substance to the summary.

correct_entities.why: Department of Labor and the rule title are correctly named.

correct_figures.why: Fed. Reg. citation 87 Fed. Reg. 73822 and dates are correct.
